req-auth-001.description: Users can sign up with email and password via Supabase Auth

req-auth-002.description: Users can log in with email and password via Supabase Auth

req-auth-003.description: Users can log out, clearing session state

req-auth-004.description: Local MST state tracks current user, loading states, and errors for reactive UI

req-auth-005.description: Auth state persists across page refreshes (session restoration)

req-auth-006.description: Supabase client is injected via MST environment for testability

req-auth-007.description: Auth errors are captured and surfaced to UI (invalid credentials, network errors)
